input.task: Build a simple workflow with a Manual Trigger node connected to a Set node named "full execution test". The Set node does not need any specific fields configured — just the node name.
input.conversationContext: User wants a simple workflow: Manual Trigger → Set node named "full execution test".

output.result: Error: direct builder calls require `bypassPlan: true` + an existing `workflowId` + a one-sentence `reason`. Use that combination for any edit to an existing workflow. For new workflows, multi-workflow builds, or data-table schema changes, call `plan` with a `build-workflow` task instead — the planner discovers credentials, data tables, and best practices, and schedules an orchestrator-run verification checkpoint.

input.summary: Single workflow with a manual trigger connected to a Set node named 'full execution test'.
assumptions: Set node will be named 'full execution test' as specified
No fields need to be pre-configured on the Set node — builder will leave it empty or add a sample field

item.title: Verify 'full execution test' workflow runs successfully
item.instructions: Use verify-built-workflow with the work item ID from the build outcome for wf-manual-set. Confirm the workflow runs without errors and the Set node produces output.
